case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC., VS. BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC; ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73952264) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.,
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75053075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.,
DECLARATION RE: ATTORNEY'S FEES, INTEREST, AND COSTS IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75053075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.,
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75053075) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73952264) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.,

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74621485) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC., SERVED AUG-15-2024, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC;
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74679638) AS TO DEFENDANT BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC;
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $451.04 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 75053075) AS TO DEFENDANT BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC;

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC., RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC; $13,899.60 PRINCIPAL, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,417.32 INTEREST, $451.04 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,492.96, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73952264) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC., AS TO DEFENDANT BUNNAMAN TRUCKING LLC; DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2025
